titleStmt.title: SII 38.497: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 497. (A.R. No. 497 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Rājarāja III Year: 16+1, Mesha, ba. di. 11, Wednesday, Sadayam, = 6th April 1233 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription is carelessly engraved and consequently certain words could not be read satisfactorly. It seems to record a land transaction between the ūrār of Ūṟṟattūr and an individual. It registers a sale of land to a certain Nāyaṉ Sōṟaṉ alias Iruṅgōḷar, a srutimāṉ (residing at) Neṟkuḷam in [Ūṟ]ṟattūr-nāḍu for five thousand kāśu, by the members of ūr i.e., uḍaiyāṉ Mummuḍi Śīyaṉ, a srutimāṉ of Teṉpāḍavūr, Vāḻavandan Nāyaṉ Sembiyaṉ Peraiyaṉ, uḍaiyān Peṟṟān alias Teṉkaraināḍāḻvāṉ and another person, whose name is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kaḷ śrī Irācarācatevarku yāṇṭu 10 6 vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekādaciyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattu
ṟattūrnāṭṭu neṟkuḷamuṭaiya carutimāṉnāyaṉ coṟaṉāna Iruṅkoḷaṟku Innā(ṭ)ṭṭu teṉpāṭāvūruṭai curutimāṉ mummuṭi ciyaṉu
pāraṉum vāḻavantāṉ nāyaṉ cempiyaṉperaiyaṉum Uṭaiyān peṟṟāṉāna teṉkaraināṭāḻvāṉum Inālvom nilavilaippiramā
ṉcey nilattukkum Ellaiyāvatu teṉpāṭāvūr Ūr nattattil Ivarku nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa maṉaikku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai
nokki pokiṟa Irāmateruvil niṟkiṟa kallukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ālakkaṉārkuṟucci Ellaiyil maṉaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nakara
llai nakarattaār matiḷil mel kaṭaikku teṟkum Itaṉ kiḻakku periya [maṉ ṟa]p pokiṟa teruvukku teṟkum Āka Icainta nālu Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa maṉaikaḷil �
m Iruppāṉa maṉaikaḷaṟṟu nikkina maṉaikku Ellaiyāvatu periya maṉaṟṟi kiḻakku nokki pokiṟa teruvukku teṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ālakkaṉārkuṟicci Ellai
ṟāṭiyum vilakka mayamāṉa yavam kiḻkai makai kol Ālakkaṉārkuṟicci Ellaikku meṟku vaṭakarai nāṭāḻvān maṉaikku kiḻakku kol 4mukkālmmāka kuḻi
ṉukku viṟṟa kuḻi [7 10 8] Āka 10 6 nikki nikki niṉṟa maṉaikaḷum Innāṉkellai mum kiṇaṟum
nāṅkaḷ ten pāṭāvūr puṉceynilattu Ivaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa puṉceyku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai lakka nari[ kkuṟiThe letter ‘ṟi’ is engraved below.] cci El
�ḻvānceykku vaṭakkum koḷkiṟāṉ kāṇiyāna neṭuṅkūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai koṟkiṉi Iran cci Eli kku kiḻa
pokiṟa peruvaḻikku teṟkum Icainta perunāṉkellai Uḷpaṭṭa patiṉā ṭiyum vilakkaṭiyumāna kolāl puṉ vākai veliyum
ṉṟāṭu naṟkācu » mukkāl Ikkācu Aiyyāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷi�
yaṉum kaṟaiyeṟaviṭṭāṉ koyil Ūṟai yarāyaṉum paIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.497 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
